rows.description: Computy Rectoris a Dō. Die Novembris 1760 ad Eundem Diem revolution 1761.
rows.notes: Merged description from gemini-flash's two lines for accuracy and gpt-5-mini's approach of combining them into a single logical header. gpt-5-mini's notes acknowledge ambiguity, which is good. Visual check confirms 'Eundem Diem' and 'Dō.'.
rows.section_header: Computy Rectoris a Dō. Die Novembris 1760 ad Eundem Diem revolution 1761.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description based on visual verification of 'Propriti' over gpt-5-mini's 'Propositi'. Clear reading from the image.

Amounts agreed by both. Selected gemini-flash's description 'Kidlington augment: Cardomas' as it matches the visual inspection better, especially the initial 'K' and the ending of 'Cardomas'. gpt-5-mini correctly noted text ambiguity.
rows.english_description: Augmentation (ecclesiastical top-up) received relating to the Kidlington estate (Cardomas).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation received relating to the Kidlington estate (Cardomas), amounting to £56 5s 10d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Selected gemini-flash's description based on visual verification ('Capon. & Brown'). gpt-5-mini correctly noted ambiguity in the text.
rows.english_description: Rent/receipt from Capon and Brown (same account as the Kidlington entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Capon and Brown, amounting to £2 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Selected gemini-flash's description based on visual verification. Both notes are generic but amounts are very clear.
rows.english_description: Annual (feast-day) payment received from Long Wittenham for 1761.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment received from Long Wittenham for 1761, amounting to £23 13s 10d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Selected gemini-flash's description based on visual verification ('Luce, Zator'). gpt-5-mini correctly noted text ambiguity.
rows.english_description: Michaelmas payment for 1761 received from Luce and Zator.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Michaelmas payment for 1761 received from Luce and Zator, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on all values for this subtotal line. Values are clearly visible in the image.

rows.description: Berrington pro prim: an: ad Fest annu: 1761
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for both description and amounts. Visual verification confirms 'Berrington' and the 3 pence with '3/4' fraction. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pence as 0 and missed the fraction, interpreting it as 'marginal annotations'.
rows.english_description: First-year annual payment from Berrington made at the feast for 1761.
rows.english_description_with_amount: First-year annual payment from Berrington at the feast, amounting to £1 10s 3.75d.

rows.description: Lord John Bigg, nunc Taylor pro prim: ad Fest. annum: 1
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for both description and amounts. Visual verification confirms 'Fest. annum: 1' and the 6 pence with '1/4' fraction. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pence as 0 and missed the fraction.
rows.english_description: First-year annual payment at the feast from Lord John Bigg (noted as now Taylor).
rows.english_description_with_amount: First-year annual payment from Lord John Bigg (now Taylor) at the feast, amounting to £1 13s 6.25d.

rows.notes: Consensus on all values for this subtotal line. Values are clearly visible in the image.
Visual verification confirms 'Varia.' with a capital 'V'. Gemini-flash's transcription is more accurate.

rows.description: Received of Dr Fortune Deans fees
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'Dr Fortune Deans fees' and the amount 18 pounds, 3 shillings, 8 pence. Gemini-flash is more accurate for both description and amount.
rows.english_description: Dean's fees received from Dr Fortune.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dean's fees received from Dr Fortune, amounting to £18 3s 8d.

rows.description: Received Plate Money of Mr Jeo
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Visual verification confirms the name is 'Mr Jeo' (distinct 'J'), not 'Mr Yeo'. Gemini-flash is more accurate for the description.
rows.english_description: Plate money received from Mr Jeo.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money received from Mr Jeo, amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.description: Bill Drawn on Mr Bonney on acct of Dr Shortridges Benefaction for ye last year 1760
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Merged gemini-flash's split description which is more accurate on names ('Bonney', 'Shortridges'). gpt-5-mini correctly identified it as a single logical entry.
rows.english_description: Bill drawn on Mr Bonney relating to Dr Shortridge's benefaction for the year 1760.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bill drawn on Mr Bonney on account of Dr Shortridge's benefaction for 1760, amounting to £80 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on all values. Values are clearly visible in the image.
rows.english_description: Plate money received for Mr Ellicombe.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money received for Mr Ellicombe, amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.description: of Dr Bigg Deans fees for 2 yrs
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Visual verification confirms the name 'Dr Bigg', not 'Dr Bray'. Gemini-flash is more accurate for the description.
rows.english_description: Dean's fees received from Dr Bigg covering two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dean's fees received from Dr Bigg for two years, amounting to £27 8s 2d.

rows.description: Bill on Mr Bonney on acct of Dr Shortridges Benefaction ye
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Visual verification confirms 'Bonney' and 'Shortridges Benefaction ye'. Gemini-flash is more accurate for the description.
rows.english_description: Bill on Mr Bonney on account of Dr Shortridge's benefaction (additional amount).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bill on Mr Bonney on account of Dr Shortridge's benefaction, amounting to £120 0s 0d.

rows.description: Recd from an unknown Hand a gift of
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Visual verification confirms 'Recd' (abbreviated). Gemini-flash is more accurate for the description.
rows.english_description: A gift received from an unknown benefactor.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Gift received from an unknown hand, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on all values. Values are clearly visible in the image.
rows.english_description: Fees received for Dr Stephens's degree.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Degree fees received for Dr Stephens, amounting to £4 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both, and visually confirmed including the 1/2 fraction. Custom description using 'Bursar' from gpt-5-mini and 'Increment Mids:' from gemini-flash, as per visual verification.
rows.english_description: Bursar Mr Webber's increment received at Midsummer 1760.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bursar Mr Webber's increment received at Midsummer 1760, amounting to £0 9s 7.5d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both and visually confirmed. Selected gemini-flash's description as it accurately reads 'Recd' and 'Increment'. gpt-5-mini's note provided good detail on the fraction reading.
rows.english_description: Increment received (same source as previous) at Midsummer 1761 — i.e. Mr Webber's increment.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Increment received (Mr Webber) at Midsummer 1761, amounting to £11 17s 2.5d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description and amounts. Visual verification confirms 'Recd Share of Mildenhall Timber' and the fraction as '1/4' (0.25). gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified parts of the description and read the fraction as 0.5.
rows.english_description: Share of proceeds from the sale of timber at Mildenhall received.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Share of Mildenhall timber proceeds received, amounting to £5 14s 1.25d.

rows.description: of Mr Upton Deans Fees for ye yrs ending January 1760.
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Visual verification confirms the description 'of Mr Upton Deans Fees for ye yrs ending January 1760.'. Gemini-flash is more accurate.
rows.english_description: Dean's fees received from Mr Upton for the years ending January 1760.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dean's fees received from Mr Upton for the years ending January 1760, amounting to £7 14s 4d.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms the amount 301 pounds, 7 shillings, 1 pence and '1/4' fraction. Gemini-flash's reading of the fraction is accurate. gpt-5-mini misread the fraction as 0.5.
Amounts agreed by both and visually confirmed, including the 1/2 fraction. Selected gemini-flash's description 'Receptorium' as more accurate. gpt-5-mini correctly noted the inline amount format.
Amounts agreed by both and visually confirmed. Selected gemini-flash's description 'Præcedentis' as it matches the script more accurately. Both noted the inline format.
Consensus on all values. Both notes correctly identify the inline format and the halfpenny fraction. Visually confirmed.
